evals.prompt: How do I find email addresses for prospects at a specific company using GetProspect?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using GetProspect Email Finder and B2B database to find prospect emails filtered by company or domain

assertions.name: mentions_email_finder_or_b2b_database
assertions.description: Mentions Email Finder feature or B2B database for finding prospect emails

assertions.name: mentions_company_domain_filtering
assertions.description: Mentions filtering by company name or domain to narrow results

assertions.name: mentions_credits_system
assertions.description: Mentions the credits system and valid emails counting toward usage

evals.prompt: I want to set up a cold email sequence with A/B testing in GetProspect
evals.expected_output: Guidance on creating a cold email sequence in GetProspect with multiple steps, delays, and A/B testing for subject lines or messages

assertions.name: mentions_cold_email_sequences
assertions.description: Mentions cold email software and setting up sequence steps with delays

assertions.name: mentions_ab_testing
assertions.description: Mentions A/B testing for subject lines or message content

assertions.name: mentions_auto_stop_on_reply
assertions.description: Mentions auto-stop on reply to prevent sending follow-ups after a prospect responds

evals.prompt: How do I use the GetProspect API to search for leads by company and job title?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using the GetProspect Search Leads API endpoint with filter parameters for company and job title

assertions.name: mentions_search_leads_endpoint
assertions.description: Mentions the Search Leads endpoint for querying leads programmatically

assertions.name: mentions_api_key_auth
assertions.description: Mentions API key authentication for accessing the API

assertions.name: mentions_filter_parameters
assertions.description: Mentions filter parameters such as company name and job title for narrowing search results
